## checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .`, `mypy nymric`, and `pytest` all pass
- [ ] added or updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] any new site was probed with a real and a fake handle (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] public data only, no tos or rate-limit workarounds (see ETHICS.md)
